response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, Japanese language proficiency, and any demonstrated background in network security, embedded switching, or hardware-level firmware development — all essential for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex open-source systems
Demonstrated expertise in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX/embedded environments
No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement
No experience with LAN-switch security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.) or embedded firmware
